role_summary: the relationship manager manages corporate client relationships and drives banking  solutions and business growth.   key r esponsibilities:   • manage relationships with corporate clients   • identify and cross -sell banking products and services   • coordinate credit appraisal and loan processing   • monitor client accounts and credit exposure   • ensure customer satisfaction and retention   • act as  liaison between clients and internal teams
qualifications: • ca with strong finance and client -handling skills   • knowledge of corporate banking products   • communication and relationship -building skills
